description_long: This object is a large seabird with long, slender wings that are slightly arched and taper to pointed tips. Its body is streamlined and predominantly white, with subtle gray shading along the wings and tail. The beak is long, narrow, and yellow, contrasting with the otherwise pale plumage. The tail is wedge-shaped and extends straight back, with a slight fork visible at the tip. The wings show a gradient from white at the base to dark gray or black at the tips, giving the bird a striking appearance in flight. The overall form is elegant and aerodynamic, typical of birds adapted for soaring over open areas.
description: A large, white seabird with long, pointed wings, a yellow beak, and a wedge-shaped tail. The wings have dark tips and the body is streamlined for flight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full wingspan, yellow beak, and symmetrical body with dark-tipped wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bird's slender profile, long beak, and the gradient from white to dark on the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wedge-shaped tail and the full spread of the wings with dark tips.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the beak and the elegant curve of the wings.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid white body with gray shading and dark wingtips; subtle gradient on wings.
